calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Continued To May-10-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Francisco Torres, Esq., for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Company, Inc.
No appearance by the Defendant: Brenda J. Daily.
09:40 am. - Plaintiff's witness: Robin Zigeler was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - KNOX SRO lease agreement---------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice to pay or quit--- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 1241 Sixth St., #800-B, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $926.20
No attorney's fees.
Costs of $273.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Assigned To Trial Court
